findings.description: The plot expression uses an array ["x^3", "x^(log(7)/log(2))"] but the function2d kind expects a single expression string, not an array; additionally it is unclear whether the renderer supports multi-series arrays in this format.
findings.suggested_fix: Split into two separate function2d plot blocks, one with expression "x^3" and one with "x^(log(7)/log(2))", or confirm the renderer supports array expressions.
